name: Chilled Tomato Carrot Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Carrots, peeled and thinly sliced
8 medium Fresh tomatoes (about 2 pounds), peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, melt the butter.
2. Add the carrots, onion, and garlic; cook for five minutes.
3. Add seven of the tomatoes, chicken broth, basil, thyme, salt, pepper, and nutmeg.
4. Bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 30 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
6. In an electric blender or food processor fitted with a metal blade, puree thoroughly in batches.
7. Pour into a large bowl and stir in the milk.
8. (For freezing: do not put in milk until you thaw it out).
9. Chill thoroughly.
10. Stir in remaining chopped tomato.
11. Sprinkle with parsley.
12. Makes six servings.
